statusDetails.message:
- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx

- Undocumented HTTP status code

    Received: 401
    Documented: 200, 400, 404, 500

[401] Unauthorized:

    `{ "statusCode": 401, "message": "Access denied due to invalid subscription key. Make sure to provide a valid key for an active subscription." }`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X GET -H 'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: [Filtered]' 'https://api.platform.pagopa.it/fdr-org/service/v1/organizations/15376371009/fdrs/2026-07-0188888888888-0001/revisions/1/psps/88888888888/payments?page=1&size=50&subscription-key=%5BFiltered%5D'
